claim_boundary: Sequence plus label-free VHH monomer graph plus fixed public 8X6B/9E6Y PVRIG graphs, trained against computational independent dual-receptor Docking scalar geometry and pose-derived residue-contact weak supervision only; not binding, affinity, experimental competition or blocking, expression, purity, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

p0_preaccess_firewall.rule: The canonical split/status allowlist must be loaded and validated before any candidate-specific stat, hash, open, decompression, parsing, glob expansion, or coordinate read.
operation_order: join only non-coordinate source metadata against the allowlist
resolve paths only for surviving train allowlist rows
stat_regular_nonempty then sha256 then open/decompress coordinates
write immutable train-only teacher package and receipt

contact_teacher_definition.missing_pair_zero_rule: A missing sparse pair becomes zero only after candidate, receptor, VHH residue set, fixed target node set, all required Top8 pose files, and paired seed closure have passed; technical absence remains masked NA.
contact_teacher_definition.vhh_residue_order: exact model residue-mask order bound to candidate sequence_sha256 and residue index mapping
contact_teacher_definition.pair_dense_universe: all valid VHH residues cross all fixed target nodes for each valid candidate/receptor
contact_teacher_definition.marginal_dense_universe: all valid VHH residues for each valid candidate/receptor

B0_frozen_external_baseline.definition: unaltered V2.13 L1 seed43 strict whole-parent OOF evidence
B0_frozen_external_baseline.role: external baseline replay only; not the same-code paired control

C0_same_code_weight_zero.definition: exact V2.20 architecture and optimizer path with contact modules instantiated but marginal_weight=0 and pair_weight=0
C0_same_code_weight_zero.role: paired causal control for contact-supervision increment

C1_contact_shared_challenger.architecture: shared VHH and target encoders with separate terminal attention logits and contact logits
C1_contact_shared_challenger.attention_logits: independent attention projection plus conformer-specific learned positive temperature
C1_contact_shared_challenger.contact_logits: independent pair projection plus receptor-specific calibration bias

exact_v2_13_scalar_training_contract.truth_percentile: rankdata(method=average) on outer-fit exact-min truth only, percentile=(rank-1)/(n-1)
exact_v2_13_scalar_training_contract.batch_chunking: sequential chunks of 8 with ordinary final short batch; no replacement or contact balancing
exact_v2_13_scalar_training_contract.loss_scaling: divide every minibatch loss by 4 before backward; if final accumulation remainder r<4 multiply accumulated gradients by 4/r before clipping and step

contact_batch_and_reduction_contract.batch_membership: exact scalar batches; contact availability is passive and never changes row order, sampling, replacement, or batch size
contact_batch_and_reduction_contract.dense_target_construction: construct full valid universe only for contact-valid rows; fill sparse observed means; closed absent pairs are exact zero; invalid/unavailable rows have mask zero everywhere
contact_batch_and_reduction_contract.negative_sampling: none; use the complete dense valid negative universe
per_candidate_reduction: flatten logits, soft targets, uncertainty weights and validity mask
if both classes exist use 0.5*positive_mean+0.5*negative_mean; if only one exists use that class mean
average available receptor losses per candidate
candidate contact weight = batch-normalized scalar hierarchy weight * seed-tier weight * eligibility mask
weighted mean over eligible candidates; differentiable zero if no row is eligible

per_fold_contact_weight_calibration.allowed_data: outer-fit parent rows only; no outer-score, development, frozen, or quarantine rows
per_fold_contact_weight_calibration.batch_selection: first eight deterministic contact-eligible scalar minibatches under the frozen seed43 epoch0 order; no optimizer step
per_fold_contact_weight_calibration.shared_parameter_set: parameters receiving both scalar and contact gradients, bound by sorted parameter-name hash
per_fold_contact_weight_calibration.selection: smallest grid value whose median batch ratio lies in interval; if none, closest median ratio to 0.10, ties choose smaller lambda

gradient_conflict_contract.update_rule: ordinary summed gradients from frozen scalar and calibrated contact losses followed by exact V2.13 accumulation, remainder rescale, norm clipping and AdamW step
gradient_conflict_contract.prelaunch_fail_rule: after lambda selection, fail the fold before optimizer creation if scalar-contact shared-gradient cosine is below -0.50 in more than 2 of the 8 calibration batches
gradient_conflict_contract.training_monitor: log per-step and per-epoch shared-gradient cosine and norm ratio without changing weights, projecting gradients, skipping batches, or altering optimization

B0_replay_gate.reconstruction: concatenate the five bound original fold prediction files, enforce one row per candidate, and stable-sort with the original aggregator
B0_replay_gate.numeric_comparison: exact serialized decimal string equality, not tolerance equality
B0_replay_gate.distinction: B0 replay proves old baseline evidence integrity; C0 is a new same-code zero-contact paired control and is not required to be bitwise identical to B0. C1 must beat both.

paired_initialization_and_execution.C0_first_then_C1_or_C1_first_bias: launch order alternates by fold parity; each runs in a distinct deterministic process from the same serialized initialization

diagnostics_and_ablations.availability_baseline: diagnostic-only score=1 for train-materializer contact availability and 0 otherwise with candidate_id tie-break; never a forward feature or promotion model
diagnostics_and_ablations.position_baseline: outer-fit empirical contact probability by receptor, IMGT region, and VHH residue position, with no sequence, graph, target residue identity, source, parent, or candidate input
diagnostics_and_ablations.v4d_only_ablation: same C1 scalar data and initialization, but contact loss only on outer-fit V4D rows; diagnostic only and ineligible for production promotion
diagnostics_and_ablations.contact_label_shuffle: deterministic seed20260723, performed only within outer-fit source x parent x receptor strata, complete five-fold retraining, no score-parent labels touched

evaluation_contract.evaluator: exact frozen V2.13 evaluator, including budget rounding, truth thresholding and candidate_id tie-break

parent_cluster_bootstrap.row_handling: include all rows from every sampled parent occurrence; attach draw ordinal to duplicated candidate IDs only for deterministic tie-break
parent_cluster_bootstrap.metric_recomputation: recompute true top10 and predicted budget5 within each replicate using frozen evaluator rules

minimum_tests_before_formal_freeze: 04_seed917_included_multiseed_requires_two_or_more paired dual-receptor seeds including 917 and rejects 1931_plus_3253_only
05_receptor_seed_top8_closure_keeps technical_NA masked and never converts failure to zero-contact negative
06_candidate_sequence_sha256_parent_split joins are one-to-one and reproduce exactly 738 train candidates across 53 parents
07_dense contact universe golden fixture verifies 103 and 108 target node order, VHH residue mapping, valid absent-zero, and invalid all-mask-zero
08_contact batch and reduction golden fixture covers both classes, positive-only, negative-only, unavailable receptor, unavailable candidate, tier weights and differentiable zero
09_exact V2.13 scalar loss softmin top-weight percentile and batch-normalization parity against frozen golden tensors
10_exact batch shuffle chunk remainder gradient rescale clipping AdamW group and C0_C1 data-order parity
11_all five fold contract split prediction checkpoint history hashes bind and B0 aggregate is reconstructed row-by-row byte-exact
12_C0_C1 full initial state scalar_shared substate parameter-order optimizer-group and per-epoch batch-order hashes are identical before divergence
13_forward firewall and autograd role test rejects source availability reliability pose teacher M2 C2 inputs and verifies frozen PCGrad-off conflict rule
14_bootstrap promotion source-stratified availability position V4D-only and all target/contact ablation gates are deterministic on pass-and-fail synthetic fixtures
formal_freeze_requirements: all 14 minimum tests pass in one immutable log
writer draft receives independent critic approval
train-only materializer code and receipts are content-addressed
C0 C1 code path and initial-state materializer are frozen
fold calibration and gradient conflict code are frozen
all evaluator bootstrap diagnostic and ablation code are frozen
no development or frozen-test access has occurred

phase_2_only_if_phase_1_promotes.open_development: one-shot only after model predictions, model hashes, ensemble rule and all gates are frozen

known_risks: contact and scalar labels share the same computational Docking teacher and are not independent biological truth
multi-seed availability was adaptively acquired and can encode acquisition bias
only 738 of 9849 scalar-train rows have primary contact supervision
V29 non-lab pose coordinates remain unavailable and V29 lab coordinates require a new content-addressed train-only release
shared contact gradients can harm scalar enrichment despite improved contact AUPRC
source and position shortcuts can mimic contact performance
five-fold early-enrichment estimates have high variance and require whole-parent paired bootstrap
